channel.title: Unresolved on Berrytree.org
channel.description: Recent content in Unresolved on Berrytree.org

item.title: Request For Information
item.description:
Request For Information

Research inquiry about Berry family members in the 1850 Smith County, Tennessee census.

We are looking for descendents related to the following people (Most of the data for the people below was gathered from the 1850 census in Smith County, Tennessee)

item.title: Unknown Pictures Page 1
item.description:
Unknown Pictures

Unidentified Berry family photographs — can you help identify anyone?

There were several Un Identified pictures sent to me with the known pictures of Francis Marion Berry’s family pictures. They could be related to our Berry’s or the could be relatives of Fannie Lillie Hudspeth’s. She married Francis Marion Berry and the person who sent me these pictures is a descendant of Fannies Brother.
